positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene suitable for apparel printing. The central composition features large, silhouetted flora and fauna—such as stylized, glowing moths, elegant cervids with glowing antlers, and ancient, twisty trees. The art style should be highly detailed digital illustration, reminiscent of Art Nouveau meets modern folklore. Use deep indigo and emerald green tones contrasted with glowing cyan and gold accents for a bioluminescent effect. The overall atmosphere is magical and serene. Ensure strong, clear silhouettes and high contrast for visibility on fabric. Seamless composition.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, watermarks, text, logo, trademark, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, messy, amateur, abstract, photography
